heading: Sunset provision
label: 6809 Sunset provision
text: The authority of the Secretary to carry out this chapter shall terminate .September 30, 2031
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, and was translated as reading “this title”, meaning title VIII of div. J of , , , known as the Federal Lands Recreation Enhancement Act, to reflect the probable intent of Congress. For complete classification of title VIII to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 108–447118 Stat. 3377section 6801 of this titleDec. 8, 2004

Amendments2025— substituted “2031” for “2019”.Pub. L. 118–2342017— substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 115–56September 30, 2019September 30, 20182016— substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 114–223September 30, 2018September 30, 20172015— substituted “.” for “on .”Pub. L. 114–53September 30, 2017September 30, 20162014— substituted “on ” for “10 years after ”. Amendment was executed as the probable intent of Congress, notwithstanding error in directory language which referenced the editorial translation of “” rather than “the date of the enactment of this Act” which appeared in the original.Pub. L. 113–235September 30, 2016December 8, 2004December 8, 2004
